title: SaaS tenants: hide scaffold folders, clean job root uploads
description:
New and existing SaaS PipeShare tenants no longer see the pre-made DB3, PDF, Photos, and Video folders when they open File Explorer. Those paths were legacy routing buckets from early provisioning — not folders clients should manage. Infra folders like system-state stay in storage for PipeSync but are hidden from the explorer.

SaaS root uploads (no target folder selected) now land at the job root so tenants can build their own folder tree. BASE (pipeshare.live / portal-users) keeps the existing category-bucket behavior.

Who is affected: SaaS tenants on pipeshare.net (and other SaaS hosts) after you apply this platform release. BASE gets the backend immediately on OVH deploy; SaaS applies via cPanel Releases.
changeLog: Stop creating empty videos/db3/pdf/photos folders for newly provisioned SaaS tenants.
Hide videos, db3, pdf, photos, and system-state from SaaS tenant file explorer trees.
SaaS uploads without a folder path go to job root instead of type buckets.
Share and guest file trees respect the same hidden-folder rules for tenant jobs.
BASE portal-users explorer and upload routing unchanged.
